title: Progressive (PGR) Down 4.4% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?

title: Progressive Corp Is Cheaper Than The Market Despite Decades Of Outperformance
text: Progressive operates in a highly fragmented industry which is undergoing a period of consolidation in which it is among the winners. The company has delivered growth and profits for decades, coming unstuck in 2021 alone, in purely exceptional circumstances.
